<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\String; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\Concat; class ConcatRemoveRight extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'String'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Removes the right part of a concat expression.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = 'Hello' . ' World'; // [tl! remove] $a = 'Hello'; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Concat::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Concat $node */ return $node->left; } }
